DISCOVERY, 302, AS TO PLAINTIFF ABDULGANI BADANI'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES, DEFENDANTS HAVE FAILED TO RESPOND TO DISCOVERY AND HAVE ALSO FAILED TO FILE ANY RESPONSE, LET ALONE OPPOSITION TO THE PENDING MOTION. ACCORDINGLY, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL IS GRANTED WITH SANCTIONS AWARDED AGAINST EACH DEFENDANT IN THE AMOUNT OF $545, TOTALING $1090, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS. THE COURT SIGNS THE PROPOSED ORDER SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL, COMPLETED AS SET FORTH ABOVE. JUDGE PRO TEM: JAMES H. FLEMING, CLERK: SEAN KANE, NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Interrogatories
Off Calendar Jan-14-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Defendant SAMIR SEIBAA, Tel No. 415-570-3858 appearing in pro per;
No other appearances made in this matter.

The Court determines that Defendant Samir Seibaa did not properly/timely contest the Court's tentative ruling, and, thus, cannot hear any argument from Mr. Seibaa. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. As to PLAINTIFF ABDULGANI BADANI'S Motion To Compel Answers To Interrogatories, Defendants have failed to respond to discovery and have also failed to file any response, let alone opposition to the pending motion. Accordingly, plaintiff's motion to compel is granted with sanctions awarded against each defendant in the amount of $545, totaling $1090, to be paid within 30 days. The Court signs the proposed order submitted by plaintiff's counsel, completed as set forth above. Judge Pro Tem: James H. Fleming, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Interrogatories
Off Calendar Jan-06-2016 Continued To Jan-14-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)
